### kiri ai cli-reference

Generate ``.kirimana/cli.json`` +...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri ai cli-reference [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project`, `-p` | Directory to write .kirimana/ into (defaults to CWD). | no | . |  |

### kiri ai gate-test

Dry-run the AI query gate on a candidate...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri ai gate-test [OPTIONS] SQL_OR_FILE
```

### Arguments

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `SQL_OR_FILE` | SQL string, path to a .sql file, or '-' for stdin. Quote the SQL when passing it directly. | yes |  |  |

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project`, `-p` | Path to the project root (defaults to CWD). | no |  |  |
| `--permissive` | Demote unresolved / unparseable to GATED instead of FORBIDDEN. Use during development; never in production. | no | False |  |
| `--catalog` | Default catalog for 1- / 2-part identifiers. Mirrors the active Genie / Databricks workspace catalog. | no |  |  |
| `--schema` | Default schema for unqualified table refs. | no |  |  |
| `--caller` | Caller identity recorded in the audit entry. | no | cli.dry-run |  |
| `--model` | LLM model name recorded in the audit entry. | no | cli.dry-run |  |

### kiri ai-batch prepare

Validate the batch + print a cost...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri ai-batch prepare [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--batch` | Path to the JSONL batch from `kiri inventory pre-classify`. | yes |  |  |

### kiri ai-batch run

Execute the batch through the AI gateway.

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri ai-batch run [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--batch` | Input JSONL batch. | yes |  |  |
| `--results` | Output JSONL results file (one line per gateway call). | yes |  |  |
| `--max-cost-usd` | Hard cost cap; aborts mid-run if exceeded. | no |  |  |
| `--rate-limit` | Soft per-minute rate ceiling. Set to 0 to disable. | no | 30 |  |

## kiri incident

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri incident [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

None.

### Subcommands

- [`kiri incident dispatch`](#kiri-incident-dispatch) - Manually dispatch one incident to the...
- [`kiri incident health`](#kiri-incident-health) - Verify the configured ITSM is reachable +...
- [`kiri incident list-recent`](#kiri-incident-list-recent) - List the most recent incident dispatches.
- [`kiri incident setup`](#kiri-incident-setup) - Walk operator through wiring an ITSM into...
- [`kiri incident status`](#kiri-incident-status) - Show the most recent dispatch state for a...

### kiri incident dispatch

Manually dispatch one incident to the...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri incident dispatch [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--source-id` | Stable dedup key. Format `<source>:<scope>` - e.g. `apply:fact-orders:fail`, `sla:orders:freshness`. | yes |  |  |
| `--title` | Ticket subject (max 200 chars) | yes |  |  |
| `--summary` | Markdown body. Cite apply_id / contract / error verbatim. | yes |  |  |
| `--severity` | low \| medium \| high \| critical | no | medium | `low`, `medium`, `high`, `critical` |
| `--category` | technical \| data \| orchestration | no | technical | `technical`, `data`, `orchestration` |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project root. | no |  |  |
| `--apply-id` | ApplyLogEntry.apply_id - populate the trace link. | no |  |  |
| `--contract-name` | Contract this incident concerns; populates trace link. | no |  |  |
| `--target-env` | Environment (dev/test/prod) the incident affects. | no |  |  |
| `--git-sha` | Project git SHA at time of event - for reproduction. | no |  |  |

### Examples

```bash
kiri incident dispatch \
```

Mint a new API key.

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri incident-api keys create [OPTIONS]
```

None.

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--name` | Human-readable client label (e.g. 'status-page', 'grafana-prod', 'security-audit'). | yes |  |  |

## kiri maturity

Gartner BI maturity scoring + advisory...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri maturity [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

None.

### Subcommands

- [`kiri maturity assess`](#kiri-maturity-assess) - Score the project against the Gartner BI...

### kiri maturity assess

Score the project against the Gartner BI...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri maturity assess [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project root (defaults to current directory). | no |  |  |
| `--format` | Output format: text \| json \| markdown. | no | text |  |
| `--require-level` | Exit non-zero if project's current level < this. Useful in CI to gate merges to platforms that have committed to a maturity floor. | no |  |  |

### Examples

```bash
kiri maturity assess
```

```bash
kiri maturity assess --format json
```

```bash
kiri maturity assess --require-level 4
```
